Generated from `cargo doc --no-deps -p nemo-relay -p nemo-relay-adaptive -p nemo-relay-pii-redaction -p nemo-relay-ffi`.

Hot-cache structures used by the adaptive runtime on the intercept path. Hot-cache state shared by adaptive runtime features.

## Structs

- [HotCache](/reference/api/rust-library-reference/nemo-relay-adaptive/types/cache/struct-hotcache): In-memory cache of adaptive artifacts needed on the hot path.
